==Biography==
Steven Jesús Cordero Murillo since child he was introduced into videogames. He always liked the idea of ​​being the best at what he played. Started playing League of Legends in January 2013 reaching Silver in Season 3 and Challenger in Season 4. Decided to take the support role when Season 4 started.
